category_sources: Official GitHub README describes screenFetch as a Bash Screenshot Information Tool: https://github.com/KittyKatt/screenFetch
source_facts.description says screenfetch generates ASCII art with terminal, shell, and OS info.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses screenFetch capitalization: https://github.com/KittyKatt/screenFetch
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is linked from the project for installation-style documentation: https://github.com/KittyKatt/screenFetch/wiki
Official repository README documents running screenFetch and command-line options: https://github.com/KittyKatt/screenFetch#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/KittyKatt/screenFetch; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README documents screenFetch as a Bash script that auto-detects distribution and displays ASCII logo plus system information: https://github.com/KittyKatt/screenFetch#readme
source_facts.description identifies ASCII art and terminal/shell/OS info.
